autocmd.Chinese:
用法：autocmd add <命令> | autocmd remove <ID> | autocmd list
功能：管理开机自启命令
示例：
  autocmd add ls - 添加ls命令到自启列表
  autocmd list - 查看所有自启命令（含ID）
  autocmd remove 1 - 删除ID为1的自启命令
适配系统：Windows/Linux/Termux全兼容
autocmd.English:
Usage: autocmd add <command> | autocmd remove <ID> | autocmd list
Function: Manage startup commands
Examples:
  autocmd add ls - Add ls to startup list
  autocmd list - View all startup commands (with ID)
  autocmd remove 1 - Delete startup command with ID 1
Compatible systems: Windows/Linux/Termux
